task_title: One-pot Golden Gate / Type IIS assembly of a four-fragment construct

children.name: Reports enzyme, ligase, cycling conditions, fragment count, transformants, and interpretation
children.requirement: The final answer uses every required field and the values are consistent with the trajectory: Type IIS enzyme is BsaI or BsmBI, ligase is T4 DNA ligase, the assembly completed successfully, and the reported transformant count matches the simulator observation.

children.name: Uses a Type IIS enzyme (BsaI or BsmBI)
children.requirement: Every golden_gate_assembly call uses BsaI or BsmBI.

children.name: Uses T4 DNA ligase
children.requirement: Every golden_gate_assembly call uses T4 DNA ligase.

children.name: Digest temperature 37 C
children.requirement: Digest cycling temperature is in 35 - 39 C.

children.name: Ligate temperature 16 C
children.requirement: Ligate cycling temperature is in 14 - 20 C.

children.name: Diagnoses enzyme / ligase / fragment-count failures when triggered
children.requirement: If the assembly reports wrong_enzyme, wrong_ligase, or wrong_fragment_count, the final answer explains the corresponding failure mode.
children.grading_notes: Defaults to full credit when no failure is triggered.

children.name: Uses a reasonable number of tool calls
children.requirement: Trajectory stays within the reference tool-call budget.
children.grading_notes: Full credit at or under optimal_tool_calls, partial credit within max_reasonable_tool_calls.
